narration: To insert cat, start at the root and make a child for c if it is missing.
Keep going letter by letter. After c comes a, then t.
After the last letter, mark that node as a whole word ending spot.
callout: The path alone is not enough. The trie must remember that cat ends here.

reflectionPrompt.prompt: Why should insert reuse old nodes instead of rebuilding the whole path every time?
